title: State Gazaetted Notification on e-waste policy 2019
INDIAN AIR FORCE RECRUITMENT RALLY NEIH TUR CHUNGCHANGA HRIATTIRNA
content:
4663/2025-2026

Dated: Mamit the 2nd of March, 2026 :Indian Air Force (IAF) 2026 chu North-East a chengte tan lak runpui kalpui a ni leh dawn a. He rally hi 9-12 March, 2026 chhungin 43 Assam Rifle, Mandir Gate, Zokhawsang, Aizawl-ah neih a ni ang.

Indian Air Force lak tur hi Mipa leh Hmeichhe tan dil theih a ni a. Hmeichhe tan hian ni 9-10, March, 2026-ah inlan theih a ni a. Mipa tan hian ni 11-12 March, 2026-ah inlan theih a ni bawk ang.

Hriat belh duh nei tanagnipathvayu.cdac.in. ah te enfiah thei a ni ang.

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT LEVEL VIBRANT VILLAGE PROGRAMME II THUTKHAWM A NI
content:
4662/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, 2nd March 2026:Vawiin chawhnu dar 1:00PM khan DC Conference Hall - ah Lawngtlai District Level Vibrant Village Programme - II (VVP-II) member-te an thukhawm a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga, District Bawrhsap chuan kaihruaiin Lawngtlai District chhunga VVP-II kalpui dan tur relho a ni a. Pu C. Lalsawmzuala, Chief Executive Member, LADC chuan a telpui.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte hnena lawmthu sawina a nei hmasa a. Vibrant Village Programme phase - I, chu 2023 ah tan a nih tawh thu a tarlang a. VVP chu India ramri hrula khaw awmte chawikanna tura ruahmanna niin, khaw pilril lutuk nia an inngaihna atanga kawng hrang hranga hmasawnna thlentir a, khaichhuah tumna a ni, a ti. Sawrkar laipuiin kalpui tura a tih ang taka kalpui a pawimawh hle tih a sawi. Bawrhsap chuan VVP- II ah chuan sawrkar hnathawk te’n an dawhkan atanga hnathawh tur an ruahman ang ni lovin khaw neitu VC leh tlawmngai pawl kalkhawmte ngeiin anmahni khaw mamawh leh tha an tih an thlang dawn tiin, heihian rah tha a chhuah ngei a beisei thu a tarlang a. Bawrhsap chuan khaw thlanchhuahah kum 5 chhung atan nuai 300 hman tur a nih angin, theihtawp chhuah turin mawhphurtute a chah nghal bawk.

Pu C. Lalsawmzuala chuan VIbrant Village Programme chu mimal taka a ngaihpawimawh thu a sawi a. A bik takin ramri hrula khua awmte chawikan an nih chuan hmasawnna lian tak a thlen a beisei tih a tarlang a. District Administration leh LADC- te inkarah lungrual taka thawhhona tha a awm zel a ngai a ni, a ti. CEM chuan VVP- II bikah LADC - ten tangkaina an neih kawng hrang hrangah theihtawp an lo chhuah tur thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Pu H. Zonunmawia, Member Secretary leh Project Director, DRDO nibawk chuan chuan report tawi pekna a nei a. Lawngtlai District- chhungah khaw 40 thlanchhuah niin, khaw pakhat tan kum khatah cheng nuai 300 ruahman a nih thu a tarlang a ni. BDO theuh ten ruahmanna an neihte chu Committee - in a pawmpui a ngaih thu sawi bawk.

Thutkhawmah hian BDO, Sangau, BDO Lawngtlai, BDO Bungtlang 'S' leh BDO Chawngte ten VVP- II hnuaia ruahmanna an neihte ngaihthlak niin, Line department atangin zawhna leh chhanna hun hman nghal a ni a. BDO ten ruahmanna an neihte hi thlitfim leh tur a ni a. Thutlukna hi tahrik ni 9, March, 2026 ah siam ni se an ti a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Lawngtlai District Level Vibrant Village Programme - II (VVP-II) member-te an telkim tha hle a,  Chairman Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawina neiin hun a khar.

title: KHUALZINTE CHUNGCHANGA MIPUITE HNENA HRIATTUR
content:
4661/2025-2026

Aizawl, 2nd March, 2026 :Tourism Department, Government of Mizoram chuan a hnuaia tarlan ang hian thuchhuah pawimawh an siam.

Mizoram hi thlawhtheihna leh lirthei chi hrang hrang hmanga kalpawh theih kan nih bakah tunhnaiah Rei Service kan nei thar ta bawk a. Hei hian Mizoram tlawhtu kan thenawm State leh ram chhung hmun hrang hrang atangin a rawn ti pung thut mai a. Heng Tourist te hian Tour Guide leh Tour Operator te kher ni lovin an remchan dan ang angin Taxi leh Rental Car te vah kual nan an hmang thin tih hriat a ni.

Mizorama hmun mawi leh tlawh tlakte hi tlawh hun bik neite an nih hlawm avangin, mipui mimir leh mikhual hruai kualtu ten fimkhur taka tlawh tur kan thlan sak thiam a pawimawh hie dawn a ni. Bangbo taka mikhualte hruai kual mai lovin; Tour Operator leh Tour Guide hmang thei Io an nih pawhin anni hnen atang hian thurawn te lak thin nisela a duhawm hie a ni. Tour Operator leh Tour Guide te list chu Department websitewww.tourism.mizoram.qov.inah en theih in a awm e.

title: Lungleiah DC Office leh department hrang hrangin lirthei khalh fimkhur turin thu an tiam
content:
4660/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 2:Vawiin khan Lunglei District Road Safety Committee thuchhuak bawhzuiin, Lungleia sawrkar hna thawkte chuan mahni pisaah ṭheuh lirthei khalh chungchanga fimkhur tura thutiam (Road Safety Pledge) an tiam.

Lunglei DC Office-a thawkte chuan DC Conference Hall-ah Additional Deputy Commissioner Pi Zoramdini kaihhruaiin Road Safety Pledge hi an chham rual a. Office hrang hranga thawkte pawhin mahni office-ah ṭheuh thu an tiam ve bawk.

Road Safety Pledge-ah hian fimkhur taka lirthei khalh ṭhin tur leh kea kalte pawh kawngpuiah fimkhur taka kal ṭhin tura intiamin; harh fima lirthei khalh tur te; dan phal chin aia chaka lirthei khalh lo tur te; ṭha taka Traffic Rules & Regulations zawm tur te; lirthei khalh laia mobile phone hmang lo tur te; kea kal, naupang leh tar chak lo zawkte ngaihtuah reng chung leh mi dangte zai ngai chunga lirthei khalh tur te; kawngpuiah fimkhur tak leh lirthei kal ngaichang chunga kea kal tur te; leh lamliana fimkhur tura mi dang pawh zirtir tur te'n an intiam a ni.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER-IN DISTRICT CATALYTIC INTERVENTION PLAN FUND SEM
content:
4659/2025-2026

Aizawl the 2nd March 2026:Vawiin khan Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan Planning & Programme Implementation Committee room-ah District Catalytic Intervention Plan Fund semna a nei. Mizorama district tinte chu an District Plan a taka an kalpuina tur cheng vaibelchhe khat theuh pek an ni.

Thu sawiin Chief Minister chuan, tun hmain District Planning Committee hi din a lo ni tawh a, meeting te pawh an nei ve thin a. Nimahsela, an district plan te a taka an kalpuina tur fund pek an ni ngai lova. An ruahmannate a takin an kalpui thei thin lo. Kan sorkar hian district-ten hma an sawnna tura anmahni ngeiin plan an nei leh chumi ti hlawhtling tura sum leh pai pek ngei theih hi kan duh a. Vawiinah a bul kan tan ta a. Kan flagship scheme Bana Kaih tihhlawhtlinna pakhat a ni, a ti a.

A enzuina kawngah DC te thuneihna sang tak pek an ni a, project proposal pawh DC te bultuma siam a ni bawk a. He fund a hlawhtlin theih nan hian kan DC ten mawhphruhna pawimawh tak an chelh a ni. A bul kan han tan ang a, kan hman that viau chuan a dang pawh la pek chhuah zel theih tura duan a ni a. Hna kha a chhe tur a ni lo, a ti.

Chief Minister hian Bank Cheque -in fund te hi a hlan a ni.

Pu Vanlaldina Fanai, Commissioner, Planning pawhin thusawiin, hetianga DC ten an district hmasawnna tura an hmalakna atana pawisa a pek tum khatna a ni a. A lawmawmin hmasawnna chhinchhiahtlak tak a ni, a ti.

Inkhawm tawi hi Pu Lalmalsawma Pachuau, Secretary, Planning chuan a kaihruai a. Catalytic Plan kalpui dan tur tlangpui a tarlang bawk.

Deputy Commissioners te aiawhin Er. Lalhriatpuia, DC, Aizawl chuan thu a sawi a. District ten project an neihte hi Mizoram District Transformation Programme zulzuia an kalpui vek a nih thu a sawi a. Scheme dang nena kaikawp (convergence) zawnga kal an awm bawk a. Sorkarin hetianga hmalakna tur fund min pe hi kan lawm a. Kan phur hle a ni, a ti.

He Fund hi Handholding Scheme Component 5 na, Decentralised Plan hnuaia pek an ni a, an pawisa dawn zaa sawm hi Admin Fund atana hman theih a ni ang. An thawh that dan a zir zela la pek belh zel tur a ni.

Attachment

title: Chief Minister Disburses District Catalytic Intervention Plan Fund
content:
531/2025-2026

Aizawl, 2nd March 2026:The Chief Minister of Mizoram, Pu Lalduhoma, today disbursed the District Catalytic Intervention Plan Fund at the Planning & Programme Implementation Committee Room. An amount of ₹1 crore has been allocated to each district to facilitate the effective implementation of their respective District Plans.

In his address, the Chief Minister stated that although District Planning Committees had been constituted earlier, no dedicated funds had been provided to meaningfully implement their plans. “For the first time in Mizoram, we are disbursing ₹1 crore to each district to fulfill their prioritized projects,” he said. He emphasized that the Government is committed to empowering districts by enabling them to formulate their own development plans and by providing the necessary financial support to ensure successful execution.

He described the initiative as a key component of the Government’s flagship scheme, Bana Kaih. The Deputy Commissioners (DCs) have been entrusted with substantial authority, and project proposals have been prepared under their leadership. The success of the fund will largely depend on the responsibility and commitment of the DCs. “This is only the beginning. If we utilize the funds efficiently, further allocations can be made in the future,” he remarked.

The Chief Minister formally handed over the funds through bank cheques.

Pu Vanlaldina Fanai, Commissioner, Planning, noted in his speech that this marks the first instance of funds being directly provided to Deputy Commissioners to proactively advance district development. He described it as a progressive and commendable step toward strengthening grassroots governance.

The function was chaired by Pu Lalmalsawma Pachuau, Secretary, Planning, who also outlined the broad modalities for implementation of the Catalytic Plan.

Speaking on behalf of the Deputy Commissioners, Er. Lalhriatpuia, IAS, Deputy Commissioner, Aizawl, expressed gratitude to the Government for the initiative. He stated that district projects would align with the Mizoram District Transformation Programme and adopt a convergence approach with other schemes wherever feasible. “We are grateful for the Government’s support and are fully committed to delivering results,” he said.

The Fund has been provided under Component 5 (Handholding Scheme) of the Decentralised Plan. Further allocations will be made based on performance and effective utilization.

Attachment

title: Trial Run of Mizoram House Online Reservation Portal
content:
530/2025-2026

2nd March, 2026:The Government of Mizoram is pleased to inform the general public that a trial run of the Mizoram House Online Reservation Portal will commence from 2nd March, 2026 (Monday) and will continue till 2nd April, 2026.

During the trial period, all reservations for accommodation at various Mizoram Houses shall be made exclusively through the online portal (mizoramhouse.mizoram.gov.in). Members of the public visiting GAD Office for manual booking and Mizoram Houses without prior booking will be requested to complete their reservation through the website.

This initiative is being undertaken to streamline the booking process, enhance transparency, and improve overall service delivery. The official launch of the Mizoram House Online Reservation Portal is proposed on 2nd April, 2026, subject to successful completion of the trial run.

The public is requested to cooperate and make use of the online reservation facility during the trial period.

Further updates, if any, will be notified in due course.

title: Mizoram House Online Reservation Portal Enchhin Dawn
content:
4658/2025-2026

2nd March, 2026:Mizoram sawrkar chuan March ni 2, 2026 (Thawhtanni) atanga April ni 2, 2026 (Thawhtanni) thlengin Mizoram House Online Reservation Portal a enchhin dawn.

Mizoram House Online Reservation Portal enchhin a nih chhung hian India ram hmun hrang hranga Mizoram sawrkar enkawl Mizoram House a room hauh lawk duh chuan online portal “mizoramhouse.mizoram.gov.in” kaltlangin dilna thehluh tur a ni a. Mipuite pawhin GAD Office leh Mizoram House pan lovin website kaltlang hian room hauh lawk dilna thehluh tur a ni ang.

He ruahmanna hi Mizoram House-a room hauh lawk dan kalphung felfai, langtlang leh mumal zawk a awm theih beiseia siam a ni a, enchhinna hi a hlawhtlin chuan April ni 2, 2026-ah official-a kalpui tan tura inruahman a ni bawk.

title: SHILLONG (ARC) MEGHALAYA-A MENINGOCOCCAL MENINGITIS NATNA HRILENG CHUNGCHANG :
content:
4657/2025-2026

2ND March, 2026:Tun hnaia Shillong-a Assam Regimental  Centre  (ARC) a Meningococcal Meningitis (Thluaka khawsik lût) natna ni a rinhlelh hrilêng chungchângah hian Integrated Diseases Surveillance Programme (IDSP), Directorate of Health Services, Mizoram chuan uluk takin thil awm dân a thlithlai reng a. Tûn dinhmunah chuan he natna hrilêng hi ARC bâk hmun dangah hmuhchhuah a la ni lo va, Meghalaya Sorkar pawhin theihtâwp chhuahin hri darh loh nân hmâ a la a, he hrilêng hi ṭaidarh lova control anih avângin Mizoram mipuite tân lo chîaîna tûr a awm lo tih kan inhriattîr a ni.

Tun dinhmunah he natna hrilêng hi Mizoramah hmuh la ni lo mahse, he natna chungchânga hriat tur pawimawh ṭhenkhat kan han tarlang ang e :

1.Meningococcal natna:

Meningococcal natna hiNeisseria menigitidisin a thlen a ni a, hei hian Meningitis leh Meningococcemia condition-te a thlen thei a ni.

2.Natna lanchhuah dân:

3.Natna inkaichhâwn dan:

4.A invên dân:

He natna hi natna chhuak thar a ni lo va, Doctor-in a chawh antibiotic hmanga enkawl dam theih a ni.

Issued by

Integrated Disease Surveillance Programme (IDSP)

Directorate of Health Services,

Mizoram : Aizawl.
